name: add-uint-support
tagline: Step-by-step guide for adding uint16/32/64 support to PyTorch operators by editing AT_DISPATCH_V2 macros.
verdict: Concrete, deterministic procedure: decision tree, worked before/after examples for both methods, and an explicit idempotency check that skips files already migrated. Gaps: no stated exclusions despite a closely related sibling skill (at-dispatch-v2), no handling for unreadable/missing target files, some duplicated examples that could move to a reference.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope text anywhere, despite an adjacent sibling skill (at-dispatch-v2) it could be confused with.
No guidance if the target file is missing/unreadable or an Edit fails; only semantic edge cases (already-migrated, floating-only) are covered.
Common patterns section largely re-shows the same before/after examples already given under Quick reference and Step 4, inflating the single file instead of splitting to a reference.
